name: OpenAI
description: OpenAI builds large language models and AI research tools, including the GPT family of models used for chat, coding, and reasoning tasks.

name: Anthropic
description: Anthropic is an AI safety company that builds the Claude family of large language models with a focus on helpful, honest, and harmless AI.

name: Cohere
description: Cohere provides enterprise-focused large language models and embedding APIs for search, retrieval, and text generation.

name: GitHub Copilot (Microsoft/OpenAI)
description: GitHub Copilot is an AI coding assistant that suggests code completions and entire functions directly inside code editors.

name: Cursor
description: Cursor is an AI-first code editor built to help developers write, refactor, and understand code faster using integrated language models.

name: Figure AI
description: Figure AI develops general-purpose humanoid robots designed to perform physical labor tasks in warehouses and manufacturing.

name: Boston Dynamics
description: Boston Dynamics designs advanced mobile robots capable of dynamic movement, balance, and manipulation for industrial and research use.

name: Stability AI
description: Stability AI develops open generative models for image, audio, and video generation, including the Stable Diffusion family of models.

name: Runway
description: Runway builds AI-powered video generation and editing tools used by filmmakers, artists, and content creators.

name: Hugging Face
description: Hugging Face provides an open platform and libraries for sharing machine learning models, datasets, and NLP tools.

name: Pinecone
description: Pinecone offers a managed vector database used to power semantic search and retrieval-augmented generation applications.

name: Scale AI
description: Scale AI provides data labeling and data infrastructure services used to train and evaluate machine learning models.

name: Character.AI
description: Character.AI lets users create and chat with customizable AI characters powered by large language models.

name: Perplexity AI
description: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered answer engine that combines search with large language models to provide cited, conversational answers.

name: Midjourney
description: Midjourney is an independent research lab that produces an AI tool for generating images from natural language prompts.

name: Weights & Biases
description: Weights & Biases builds developer tools for tracking machine learning experiments, models, and datasets.

name: Adept AI
description: Adept AI builds AI agents that can take actions inside software applications on behalf of users, based on natural language instructions.

name: Replit
description: Replit provides a browser-based coding environment with an integrated AI assistant that helps users write and deploy software.

name: Waymo
description: Waymo develops self-driving vehicle technology and operates autonomous ride-hailing services using AI-based perception and planning systems.

name: ElevenLabs
description: ElevenLabs creates AI voice generation tools for realistic text-to-speech, voice cloning, and audio content creation.
